summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VMS360 Heatmap On-Demand Report Generation feature. The new architecture (Floor selection -> Date range -> Generate Report) is working correctly. Backend APIs pass 81% (13/16 tests), with PDF export failing due to missing system library. Frontend UI is fully functional with all features working as expected.

critical.issue: PDF export fails with 520 error due to missing libpangoft2 system library required by weasyprint

integration_issues.issue: PDF Rapor button shows error toast 'PDF dışa aktarma başarısız: Request failed with status code 520' due to backend issue

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - Recharts container sizing issue on initial load

action_items: Install libpangoft2-1.0-0 and related pango libraries for weasyprint PDF generation to work
Fix Recharts container sizing warning on dashboard (minor)
critical_code_review_comments: PDF export endpoint needs fallback handling when weasyprint dependencies are missing - should return user-friendly error instead of 500

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all features work except PDF export due to backend issue)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data for Forum Kadikoy store with AVM Ana Koridor floor
context_for_next_testing_agent: Heatmap on-demand report generation feature is fully functional. PDF export requires system library installation (libpangoft2). All other features (floor selection, date range, report generation, timeline playback, comparison mode, visualization settings) work correctly.

features_tested.floor_selection: PASS - Store list expands to show floors, floor selection works
features_tested.date_range_picker: PASS - Start and end date inputs work correctly
features_tested.rapor_olustur_button: PASS - Generates heatmap report with timeline data
features_tested.heatmap_canvas: PASS - Gaussian diffusion rendering works, shows color gradient
features_tested.report_stats_panel: PASS - Shows Veri Noktası (21), Kamera Sayısı (4), Toplam Ziyaretçi (129), Alan (40x12m)
features_tested.timeline_playback: PASS - Play/pause/skip controls work, frame indicator updates
features_tested.comparison_mode: PASS - Karşılaştır button opens comparison panel with date selector
features_tested.pdf_export: FAIL - Backend error due to missing weasyprint dependencies
features_tested.visualization_settings: PASS - Opacity slider and toggle switches work correctly
